name: The Bloomsbury Hub
description: Bright, modern workspace in the heart of Bloomsbury. Walking distance to three Tube stations. Recently refurbished with premium furniture and dedicated reception.

name: Shoreditch Creative Quarter
description: Creative coworking space in the heart of Shoreditch's tech scene. Open plan layout with breakout zones, regular community events, and 24/7 access.

name: Canary Wharf Tower Suite
address: One Canada Square, Level 39, London E14 5AB
description: Premium office suite on the 39th floor of One Canada Square. Panoramic views across London. Full concierge service, dedicated reception, and access to building gym and restaurant.

name: Farringdon Works
description: Character-filled managed office in a converted Victorian warehouse. Exposed brick, high ceilings, private roof terrace. 3 minutes to Farringdon station (Elizabeth line).

name: Mayfair Executive Suite
description: Prestigious Mayfair address with full business services. Ideal for client-facing businesses requiring a premium London presence. Grade II listed building.

name: Kings Cross Innovation Hub
description: Large-scale coworking in the Kings Cross regeneration area. Walking distance to 6 Tube lines. Ideal for growing teams who want flexibility. Monthly rolling contracts.

name: Southbank Studios
description: Quiet, focused managed office overlooking the Thames. Perfect for small professional teams. Meeting rooms bookable by the hour. 5 min walk from Waterloo.

name: Liverpool Street Exchange
description: Premium City workspace in Broadgate Circle. Full concierge and reception services. Direct access to Liverpool Street station. Ideal for financial services and professional firms.

name: Camden Collective
address: Unit 7, The Stables Market, London NW1 8AH
description: Vibrant coworking in the iconic Stables Market. Strong creative community. Regular networking events and workshops. Flexible hot-desking and dedicated desk options.

name: Paddington Central
description: Modern serviced offices in the Paddington Central development. Heathrow Express on your doorstep. Great for businesses with international travel needs. Canal-side setting.

name: Bermondsey Workspace
description: Converted warehouse space in up-and-coming Bermondsey. Raw industrial aesthetic with modern fit-out. Growing food and creative scene on your doorstep.

name: Victoria Gate Offices
description: Professional serviced office near Victoria station. Walking distance to Westminster, Buckingham Palace, and St James's Park. Ideal for government-facing and policy organisations.
